positive: A whimsical, detailed illustration of a majestic forest creature—a combination of fox and foxglove—sitting in a lush meadow at golden hour. The creature has intelligent, expressive eyes and a graceful, curved silhouette. The background features delicate wildflowers (foxgloves, clover, daisies) and subtle bokeh forest depth, rendered with clean line work and flat graphic illustration style, suitable for t-shirt printing. Color palette: deep moss green, burnt orange, cream white, and pops of magenta. Composition: Central and symmetrical, emphasizing the animal's pose. Style: Scandinavian folk art meet modern tattoo flash, vector aesthetic, high contrast, clean lines, excellent definition, flat colors with subtle gradient depth.
negative: blur, amateur, text, watermark, signature, logo, artifact, extra limbs, low quality, noisy, grainy, bad anatomy, cropped, mutated, illegible, copyright, photorealism, 3d render
